npc_seeds.name: Dante 'Razor' Martinez
npc_seeds.territory: 24th Street corridor, specifically the area around Arizona State Hospital
npc_seeds.reputation: Known as the most effective Anarch recruiter in Phoenix. Respected by Rabble, tolerated by Romantics. Camarilla sees him as public enemy number one.
npc_seeds.story_function: Primary point of contact for Anarch-aligned PCs; can provide access to rants, Anarch networks, and street-level intelligence.

npc_seeds.name: Dr. Elena Vasquez
npc_seeds.territory: ASU campus, nearby coffee shops and bookstores
npc_seeds.reputation: One of the rare 20%—a philosopher who can turn a rant into a movement. Respected by Romantics, viewed with suspicion by Rabble who think she's too academic.
npc_seeds.story_function: Provides ideological depth to Anarch movement; can explain Brujah history and philosophy to PCs; potential mentor for intellectual characters.

npc_seeds.name: Marcus 'Brick' Thompson
npc_seeds.reputation: The muscle of the Phoenix Brujah. Not a thinker, but fiercely loyal and impossible to intimidate. Known for starting fights that others finish.
npc_seeds.story_function: Provides muscle for dangerous operations; can escalate situations when PCs need violence; represents the 80% Rabble perspective.

npc_seeds.name: Selena Cross
npc_seeds.reputation: Viewed as traitor by Anarchs, as necessary evil by Camarilla. One of the few Brujah who maintains Camarilla position after Prince's death. Deeply conflicted.
npc_seeds.story_function: Represents Brujah who remain in Camarilla; can provide insider information; creates moral complexity for PCs who must choose between loyalty and principle.

npc_seeds.name: Jax 'The Voice' Morrison
npc_seeds.reputation: Legendary ranter who can turn a parking lot into a revolution. Hybrid between Rabble and Romantic—charismatic street fighter with surprising philosophical depth.
npc_seeds.story_function: Can mobilize crowds and shift political momentum; PCs might need to protect him from Camarilla retaliation or recruit him for their own causes.

npc_seeds.name: Karina 'Silence' Petrov
npc_seeds.reputation: Former Anarch who became disillusioned. Now operates as neutral party, selling information to both Camarilla and Anarchs. Trusted by neither, useful to both.
npc_seeds.story_function: Provides information and contacts; represents Brujah who reject both major factions; can serve as neutral ground for negotiations.

npc_seeds.name: Tyrone 'Flash' Washington
npc_seeds.reputation: Dangerous and unpredictable. Believes in burning everything down. Respected for commitment, feared for lack of restraint. Represents the most volatile Brujah element.
npc_seeds.story_function: Creates chaos and forces PCs to respond; can be manipulated by enemies or used as weapon; represents the destructive potential of unchecked Brujah rage.

npc_seeds.name: Professor James Chen
npc_seeds.reputation: One of the most dangerous Brujah in Phoenix precisely because he's not violent. A strategist who plans revolutions. Respected by Romantics, viewed as threat by Camarilla.
npc_seeds.story_function: Provides long-term strategy and planning; can explain how to build movements rather than just start riots; potential ally for PCs who want to change the city systematically.

npc_seeds.name: Rosa 'Chainbreaker' Mendez
npc_seeds.reputation: Rare Brujah who can actually negotiate without starting fights. Respected for ability to bridge Rabble and Romantic factions. Trusted by Gangrel and Nosferatu.
npc_seeds.story_function: Can facilitate negotiations between hostile factions; represents possibility of Brujah diplomacy; useful for PCs who want to prevent violence rather than cause it.

npc_seeds.name: Viktor 'The Ghost' Novak
npc_seeds.reputation: Old-school Brujah who believes in Camarilla structure despite its flaws. Views Anarchs as traitors. Hated by Anarchs, valued by Camarilla elders who need muscle.
npc_seeds.story_function: Represents Brujah who fully embrace Camarilla; creates internal conflict within clan; can be antagonist for Anarch-aligned PCs or ally for Camarilla-aligned ones.

notes: These NPCs represent the diversity of Phoenix Brujah: Rabble and Romantics, Anarchs and Camarilla, activists and nihilists. They can serve as allies, enemies, mentors, or obstacles depending on PC choices and story needs. Each represents a different aspect of Brujah identity and creates different story possibilities.
